message:
Fix session health validation and extension index NPM package name preservation

Session Health (src/doctor.rs):
- Improve is_session_healthy() to validate proper SessionHeader structure
  instead of generic "is valid JSON" check
- New session_header_is_valid() helper: checks type=="session", version==3,
  non-empty id/cwd fields
- Add #[cfg(feature = "sqlite-sessions")] branch for SQLite session validation
- New tests: session_healthy_valid_json (v3 fixture), rejects_non_header_json
  (array rejection), valid_sqlite, rejects_invalid_sqlite_header

Extension Index (src/extension_index.rs):
- Fix seed_index() to use `package` field from provenance instead of
  duplicated item.name for NPM install sources
- New persist_tempfile_for_cache() helper wraps tempfile persist() with
  platform-specific conflict handling
- Windows: on AlreadyExists, attempt remove+persist retry (fail-open cache)
- Non-Windows: pass through error unchanged
- Better error context wrapping for persistence failures
- New test: seed_index_uses_npm_package_for_install_source()

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
